curios.name: Curios
curios.blurb: Weird little things people inexplicably want.

junk.name: Junk
junk.blurb: One person's trash is your scoring liability.

valueBands.comment: true values are drawn from these bands; pitchers see exact value, table sees only category

artifacts.name: Definitely-Not-Cursed Etruscan Goblet
artifacts.flavor: The previous three owners all 'moved away suddenly.'

artifacts.name: Sumerian Tax Receipt (Clay)
artifacts.flavor: Even 4,000 years ago, someone owed someone money.

artifacts.name: Pharaoh's Spare Sandal
artifacts.flavor: Left foot. The right one is in a museum and very smug about it.

artifacts.name: Roman Coin (One Of Billions)
artifacts.flavor: They minted a LOT of these. A lot.

artifacts.name: Bronze Age Fidget Spinner
artifacts.flavor: Anthropologists are still arguing about what it 'really' was.

artifacts.name: Minoan Snack Bowl
artifacts.flavor: Trace residue suggests ancient olives. Or modern olives. Unclear.

artifacts.name: Phoenician Shipping Manifest
artifacts.flavor: It's a list of jars. That's it. Jars.

artifacts.name: The Lesser Rosetta Sticky-Note
artifacts.flavor: Translates only the word 'hello' across three dead languages.

artifacts.name: Babylonian Lottery Ticket
artifacts.flavor: Did not win. Still, you know, ancient.

artifacts.name: Hammurabi's Rough Draft
artifacts.flavor: Mostly crossed-out laws and a doodle of a goat.

artifacts.name: Greek Vase (Slightly Re-Glued)
artifacts.flavor: You can barely see the crack. Barely.

artifacts.name: Neolithic Doorstop
artifacts.flavor: It is a rock. A historically-adjacent rock.

artifacts.name: Jar of 'Authentic' Victorian Air
artifacts.flavor: Smells faintly of dust and class anxiety.

artifacts.name: Two-Headed Taxidermy Squirrel
artifacts.flavor: Both heads disapprove of you.

artifacts.name: Napoleon's Other Hat
artifacts.flavor: He had several. This is the medium one.

artifacts.name: Mummified Cat Named 'Greg'
artifacts.flavor: The label is modern. Greg is not.

artifacts.name: World's 3rd Largest Ball of Twine
artifacts.flavor: Bronze medal of twine. So close.

artifacts.name: A Genuinely Haunted Music Box
artifacts.flavor: Plays at 3am whether you wind it or not.

artifacts.name: Shrunken Head (Allegedly Decorative)
artifacts.flavor: The gift shop swears it's resin. The gift shop sweats while saying this.

artifacts.name: Glass Eye Collection (Mismatched)
artifacts.flavor: 47 eyes. None of them a pair. All of them watching.

artifacts.name: Edison's Failed 4,001st Lightbulb
artifacts.flavor: It does not light up. That's the historic part.

artifacts.name: Antique Mousetrap (Still Set)
artifacts.flavor: Handle with the respect a 200-year-old spring demands.

artifacts.name: Bottle of Tears (Provenance: A Clown)
artifacts.flavor: Certified melancholy. Notarized sorrow.

artifacts.name: A Slightly Sentient Doll
artifacts.flavor: It blinks when the bidding gets exciting.

artifacts.name: Splinter of the True Hatstand
artifacts.flavor: Of which there are, suspiciously, several thousand splinters.

artifacts.name: St. Eustace's Left Knee (Probably)
artifacts.flavor: A knee. A holy, holy knee.

artifacts.name: The Cursed Amulet of Regret
artifacts.flavor: Wearing it makes you reconsider every purchase. Ironic, at auction.

artifacts.name: Holy Grail (Travel Size)
artifacts.flavor: TSA-compliant eternal life.

artifacts.name: Monk's Self-Refilling Soup Spoon
artifacts.flavor: Refills with lukewarm broth. A minor, soggy miracle.

artifacts.name: Vial of Saintly Dandruff
artifacts.flavor: Flaky devotion.

artifacts.name: The Idol That Definitely Watches You
artifacts.flavor: Eyes follow the highest bidder specifically.

artifacts.name: Prayer Beads (One Bead Missing)
artifacts.flavor: The missing bead was the important one.

artifacts.name: Reliquary of an Unnamed Toe
artifacts.flavor: Beautiful box. Mystery toe. No questions answered.

artifacts.name: The Wailing Censer
artifacts.flavor: Smells divine. Sounds like a haunted teakettle.

artifacts.name: Blessed Brick (Pilgrim Tossed)
artifacts.flavor: A pilgrim threw it. At someone, possibly.

artifacts.name: Sacred Sock of the Wandering Friar
artifacts.flavor: He walked 1,000 miles. This sock did 800 of them.

artifacts.name: 'Original' Mona Lisa (Smiling More)
artifacts.flavor: Bolder grin. Same enigmatic refusal to be authenticated.

artifacts.name: Shakespeare's Lost Grocery List
artifacts.flavor: 'To buy, or not to buy: eggs.'

artifacts.name: Dinosaur Egg (Suspiciously Warm)
artifacts.flavor: 65 million years old and freshly painted.

artifacts.name: Moon Rock (From New Jersey)
artifacts.flavor: Geologically, a parking lot.

artifacts.name: Authentic Bigfoot Footprint Cast
artifacts.flavor: Size 14. Suspiciously human. Suspiciously a boot.

artifacts.name: Da Vinci's Other Notebook (Doodles)
artifacts.flavor: Mostly helicopters and a recipe for soup.

artifacts.name: Excalibur (Comes With Receipt)
artifacts.flavor: The receipt is from a Renaissance fair.

artifacts.name: Amelia Earhart's Spare Compass
artifacts.flavor: Points firmly toward 'maybe don't.'

artifacts.name: Genuine Counterfeit Doubloon
artifacts.flavor: A real fake. The most honest item here.

artifacts.name: The Loch Ness Polaroid
artifacts.flavor: It's a log. It's clearly a log.

artifacts.name: Beethoven's Lost 10th (On Kazoo)
artifacts.flavor: Discovered last Tuesday. Very lost until then.

artifacts.name: Cleopatra's Lip Balm
artifacts.flavor: Asp-repellent. Allegedly.

artifacts.name: Box of Assorted Cables
artifacts.flavor: Three of them work. You'll never know which.

artifacts.name: Slightly Used Lawn Flamingo
artifacts.flavor: Faded to a tasteful, depressing pink.

artifacts.name: VHS Copy of a Tax Seminar
artifacts.flavor: 1987. Still relevant. Still boring.

artifacts.name: Jar of Buttons (No Two Alike)
artifacts.flavor: Every grandmother had this exact jar.

artifacts.name: A Surprisingly Collectible Spork
artifacts.flavor: Limited edition. There are dozens of us. DOZENS.

artifacts.name: Half a Pair of Binoculars
artifacts.flavor: Technically a monocular now. Aristocratic.

artifacts.name: Mystery Tupperware (Sealed)
artifacts.flavor: Do NOT open it. The value is in not knowing.

artifacts.name: Broken Umbrella (Sentimental)
artifacts.flavor: It witnessed three breakups.

artifacts.name: Single Roller Skate
artifacts.flavor: For the committed, lopsided enthusiast.

artifacts.name: Beanie Baby (The Worthless One)
artifacts.flavor: Everyone thought these would pay for college.

artifacts.name: Vintage Floppy Disk (Contents Unknown)
artifacts.flavor: 1.44MB of pure 'maybe it's important.'

artifacts.name: The Rare Misprint Garden Gnome
artifacts.flavor: Factory error gave him three thumbs. Collectors weep with joy.
